diagnosis: ARPSpoofingAttack.execute() uses an infinite while loop with no count-based exit condition; the registry entry had no 'count' param so the default was never wired through

files_changed.description: Added 'count' parameter (default 50) to __init__, stored as self.count, and added a break condition in the execute() loop after count iterations
Added ParamDef('count', 'int', False, 50, ...) to the arp-spoof registry entry so the CLI exposes --count with default 50
